summary: Fixed enum-entry validator handling, cleared residual iOS/Android/Flutter drift, and normalized SDK gap tickets to 20 total.

parts.A: Updated Android, iOS, and Flutter accuracy validators to allow known enum-entry attributes on confirmed enum entries.
parts.B: Rewrote the residual iOS enum case reference from AmityViewedType.STORY to AmityViewedType.story.
parts.C: Removed fabricated Android stream builder usage, renamed getCurrentUserId to getUserId, and rewrote fabricated AmityException branches to real error-code handling or SDK-gap warnings.
parts.D: Removed fabricated Flutter stream builder/status usage and added the AmityStreamRepository SDK-gap warning in the live-stream post doc.
parts.E: Reformatted/appended Android and Flutter SDK gap tickets so the ticket file now contains 20 tracked tickets.
